name: Hecahands Godos
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>見えざる手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ヘカトンケイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ゴッドス
desc: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Godos" once per turn. If a card(s) is added to your opponent's hand (except during the Draw Phase or Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but banish it when it leaves the field.
mnst_eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Godos" once per turn. If a card(s) is added to your opponent's hand (except during the Draw Phase or Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but banish it when it leaves the field.
eff: If this card battles a monster, neither can be destroyed by that battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "Hecahands Godos" once per turn. If a card(s) is added to your opponent's hand (except during the Draw Phase or Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During your opponent's Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can target 1 monster in your opponent's GY; Special Summon it to your field, but banish it when it leaves the field.

action: Activates if your opponent draws a card
Activates if your opponent adds a card to the hand
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your opponent's Graveyard
banished: Banishes cards when they leave the field
